---
name: Bug Report
about: Something isn't working correctly
title: "[Bug] "
labels: bug
---

**What happened?**
A clear description of the bug.

**Command you ran**
```
ai-scanner ./my-project --flags-used
```

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to see.

**Actual behavior**
What actually happened (paste output if possible).

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. macOS 15, Ubuntu 24, Windows 11]
- Node.js version: [e.g. 20.11.0]
- ai-scanner version: [e.g. 1.0.0]

**Additional context**
Any other info — file types involved, project size, etc.
